hero.title: Architecture that reveals the extraordinary in everyday life
hero.subtitle: Talita Soares | Interior Architecture

about.title: The obvious you don't see
about.description: Every space tells a story — most people simply don't notice. My work as an interior architect is to reveal the hidden potential in every environment, transforming the ordinary into the extraordinary.
about.philosophy: I believe great projects are born from honest conversations. Before drawing a single line, I need to understand how you live, what makes you feel at home, and which details go unnoticed but make all the difference in your daily life.

services.title: How I can transform your space

residential.name: Residential Design
residential.description: From concept to delivery: complete interior design for apartments, houses, and penthouses. Each space designed for your routine, balancing functionality and aesthetics.

commercial.name: Commercial Design
commercial.description: Commercial spaces that communicate your brand's essence. Offices, clinics, stores, and restaurants designed to delight clients and optimize operations.

consulting.name: Interior Consulting
consulting.description: Consulting sessions for those who need professional direction. Guidance on layout, color palette, lighting, and materials so you can execute with confidence.

followup.name: Construction Supervision
followup.description: Present at every stage of execution. Ensuring the project is materialized exactly as conceived, with quality and on schedule.

portfolio.title: Projects that transform
portfolio.subtitle: Each space is unique — just like the people who live in it

step1.title: Conversation
step1.description: I understand your needs, routine, and dreams for the space. Everything starts with an honest conversation.

step2.title: Design
step2.description: I develop the concept, floor plans, 3D renderings, and technical specifications. You participate in every decision.

step3.title: Supervision
step3.description: I oversee the execution to ensure fidelity to the project and quality in every finishing detail.

step4.title: Delivery
step4.description: The moment the space comes to life. The reveal of the transformed environment is always special.

social.title: Numbers that tell our story
ticker: things that are obvious to me as an architect

contact.title: Let's create something incredible together
contact.subtitle: Get in touch and tell me about your project. I serve Florianópolis and remotely across Brazil.
